info.title: Coinranking API
info.description: Coinranking cryptocurrency API providing real-time and historical data on coins, exchanges, markets, and global stats.

get.description: Get a list of coins with market data.

parameters.name: referenceCurrencyUuid
parameters.description: UUID of reference currency for price calculations.

parameters.name: timePeriod
parameters.description: Time period for change and sparkline data.

get.description: Get trending coins ranked by user engagement.
Get detailed information about a specific coin.
Get the price of a specific coin.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Epoch timestamp in seconds for historical price.

get.description: Get historical price data for a coin.
